repos.name: headroom
repos.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

repos.name: mhaitana.dev
repos.description: Minimalist portfolio featuring an integrated GitHub activity dashboard, career timeline, and skills breakdown. Built with Next.js 15, Tailwind v4, and Framer Motion.

repos.name: docker-llm-stack
repos.description: Hardware-aware, containerized LLM stack featuring Ollama, Open WebUI, and PostgreSQL with automated spec-based model optimization.
